appinit_restore_study_error: Teyasobodde kuzzaawo kusoma kwo okwasembayo. Okuggulawo etterekero ly’ebitabo mu kifo ky’ekyo.
main_no_study_body: Kirabika tonnalonda kuyiga Bayibuli. Nsaba ogende mu tterekero lyo okutandika.
modals_likert_rotate_tip: 💡 Amagezi: kyusa ekyuma kyo ebbali osobole okulaba obulungi minzaani.
modals_notes_info_body:
Kozesa ekifo kino ku kintu kyonna ekitakwatagana bulungi mu bibuuzo ebitegekeddwa:

• Okufumiitiriza kw’omuntu ku ssuula

• Okuwandiika mu kiseera ky’okukubaganya ebirowoozo mu kibiina

• Ebiwandiiko by’okusaba ebikubirizibwa by’osomye

• Ebibuuzo by’olina okuleeta eri omukulembeze oba omubuulirizi

Ebiwandiiko bino bibaamu ng’okozesa bbaatuuni ya Gabana ku kino essuula.
onboarding_app_slide1_body:
Okuyiga Baibuli okuwerako kwatikkibwa dda era nga kukwetegekera.
  • Buli emu kkoosi eyeetongodde nga mulimu ebitundu bya Baibuli, ebibuuzo, n’okufumiitiriza kw’omuntu ku bubwe ebizimbibwamu.
  • Soma, fumiitiriza, era wandiika eby’okuddamu byo nga bw’ogenda.
  • Eby’okuddamu byo biterekebwa mu ngeri ey’otoma nga bw’owandiika.
  • Eby’okuddamu byo osobola okufuna ebiddibwamu mu ngeri ey’otoma (ekisookerwako), oba ng’onyiga bbaatuuni yokka. Osobola okukyusa enneeyisa eno mu nteekateeka.
onboarding_app_slide2_body:
Onboarding bw’eggalawo, ojja kulaba Library — koona ku study yonna okugiggulawo.
  • Okusoma okulala kuliwo okuwanula okuva ku Load tab mu Library.
  • Okunoonyereza kujja nga .estudy fayiro — osobola n’okutikka emu okuva ku kyuma kyo singa oba ofunye emu.
onboarding_app_slide3_body:
Olupapula Engeri y'Okukozesa lunnyonnyola buli kimu.
  • Nkwata ku kabonero ka ? mu bbaala y’okutambulira waggulu essaawa yonna.
Kati ka tukutwale mu Library osobole okulonda okusoma n’otandika!
onboarding_starring_slide1_body: Koona ku kabonero k’emmunyeenye ku kaadi yonna ey’ekibuuzo okugiteekako akabonero. Ebibuuzo ebiriko emmunyeenye bifuna ‘gold highlight’ kale ne bivaayo nga bw’okola okuyita mu ssuula.
onboarding_starring_slide2_body: Ebibuuzo byo byonna ebiriko emmunyeenye birabika mu kipande ekifunze waggulu ku ssuula — ne mu Progress Overview. Omugaso mu kutegeka okukubaganya ebirowoozo mu bibinja oba okwekenneenya okw’obuntu.
onboarding_search_slide1_body: Koona ku kabonero k’okunoonya mu bbaala ey’okungulu okunoonya mu bibuuzo byonna mu kunoonyereza okuliwo kati — ne mu buli kimu ky’owandiise mu bifo byo eby’okuddamu.
onboarding_search_slide2_body: Buli kivuddemu kiraga ekibuuzo n’eky’okuddamu kyo wamu. Koona ku kivuddemu kyonna okubuuka butereevu ku ssuula eyo n’ekibuuzo.
onboarding_sharing_slide1_body: Koona ku Share wansi mu ssuula yonna okuweereza eby’okuddamu by’essuula eyo ng’oyita ku WhatsApp, email, oba app endala yonna ku ssimu yo.
onboarding_sharing_slide2_body: Okugabana eby’okuddamu byo byonna mu lugendo lumu, genda ku Settings → Study → Data → Gabana eby’okuddamu byonna. Waliwo n’enkola ya Print / export all chapters ey’okutereka nga PDF.
onboarding_sharing_slide3_body: Genda ku Nteekateeka → App → Okutereka & Okugabana → Enkola y’okugabana. WhatsApp Formatted eyongeddeko obubonero obuddugavu WhatsApp bw’ekola ng’obunene. Plain Text esinga kuyonja ku email. Osobola okugikyusa essaawa yonna.
onboarding_myprogress_slide1_body: Koona ku kabonero k’enkulaakulana mu bbaala ey’okungulu okuggulawo Enkulaakulana Okutwalira awamu — mu bufunze ebibuuzo bimeka by’ozzeemu mu buli ssuula, n’empeta y’okumaliriza okusoma kwonna.
onboarding_myprogress_slide2_body: Ebibuuzo byo byonna ebiriko emmunyeenye okuva mu buli ssuula bikung’aanyizibwa mu Progress Overview — osobole okwekenneenya ebyasinga obukulu mu kunoonyereza kwonna.
onboarding_voiceinput_slide1_body: Akabonero k’akazindaalo kalabika munda mu bifo eby’okuddamu ku byuma ebiwagirwa. Kinyige okulagira eky’okuddamu kyo ng’okozesa eddoboozi — kya mugaso ng’owandiika ku ssirini entono owulira ng’ogenda mpola.
onboarding_voiceinput_slide2_body: Yogera mu butonde era oyimirirako katono nga tonnaba kukuba stop. Ebiwandiiko ebiwandiikiddwa birabika mu kifo eky’okuddamu era bisobola okulongoosebwa mu ddembe oluvannyuma. Ekola mu lulimi lwonna ekyuma kyo kye kiwagira.
onboarding_readaloud_slide1_body: Akabonero k’emizindaalo ku bitundu bya Baibuli n’ebifuluma kaleka app okubisoma mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka — eky’omugaso mu kutuuka ku bantu, okuwuliriza ng’ogenda, oba mu ngeri ey’enjawulo yokka ey’okukwatagana n’ekiwandiiko.
onboarding_readaloud_slide2_body: Genda ku Settings → App → Read Aloud okulonda: Never, Ebitundu ebiwanvu byokka, oba Bulijjo. Ensengeka eno yeetaaga Advanced interface mode.
onboarding_biblepopups_slide1_body: Buli w’olaba akabonero akatono aka info ku mabbali g’ekintu ekijuliziddwa mu Baibuli, kanyige okusoma ekitundu mu pop-up — nga tolese kibuuzo ky’okola. Ebitundu byonna biva mu Baibuli ya NET. Ebifaananyi ebirala info biwa background context oba ennyonyola.
onboarding_notesarea_slide1_body: Buli ssuula erina ekifo eky’okuwandiika eky’eddembe wansi ennyo — ku kintu kyonna ekitakwatagana na bibuuzo ebitegekeddwa: ebirowoozo by’omuntu ku bubwe, ebintu by’olina okutunula waggulu, ebibuuzo by’olina okuleeta mu kibiina kyo.
onboarding_notesarea_slide2_body: Ebiwandiiko byo biba mu Share output ne exported PDF — kale tewali kisigala mabega. Amagezi: nyweza ebbanga ddene ekifo kyonna eky’okuddamu (nga mw’otwalidde ne Notes) okukoppa ebirimu ku clipboard.
onboarding_autosave_slide1_body: App auto-saves eky’okuddamu kyo buli lw’ogenda okuva ku nnimiro — kale teweetaaga kujjukira kutereka. Ekintu ekiyitibwa Save wansi ku buli lupapula kikuwa okutereka okw’omu ngalo okw’enjawulo buli lw’oyagala.
onboarding_interfacemode_slide1_body: App eno erina modes ssatu: Basic, Intermediate ne Advanced. Basic ekuwa obumanyirivu obuyonjo ku bintu ebikulu. Mode endala zisumulula ebintu ebirala mpolampola. Osobola okukyusa essaawa yonna — tewali data ebula.
onboarding_interfacemode_slide2_body: Jjukira ekifo kyange · Efonti y’okusoma · Sayizi y’akabokisi k’okuddamu · Omuko gwange ogw’Enkulaakulana · Omuko gw’Ebiwandiiko & Ebiteeso · Ebiwandiiko by’Abakulembeze · Enteekateeka z’etterekero ly’ebitabo · Ebipya ku App
onboarding_interfacemode_slide3_body: Sitayiro y’ebifaananyi · Butaamu eziddako/Eziddako · Okumanyisa okutereka mu ngeri ey’okwekolako · Enkola y’okugabana · Ebifuga Soma mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka · Engeri y’okukozesaamu n’Ebikwata ku lupapula okukyusakyusa Funa Interface Mode wansi mu Settings → App.
onboarding_library_slide1_body: Koona ku kabonero ka Library (waggulu ku kkono) okulaba emisomo gyo gyonna egitikkiddwa. Koona ku kusoma kwonna okukyusa ku kyo. Eby’okuddamu byo mu buli kusoma bikuumibwa nga bya njawulo ddala.
onboarding_library_slide2_body: Koona ku "Load Study" wansi ku screen ya Library okuyingiza fayiro ya .estudy. Oluvannyuma lw’okutikka, okusoma kwongerwa ku lukalala lwo enkalakkalira era osobola okuggulwawo essaawa yonna.
onboarding_library_slide3_body: Koona ku kabonero ka 🗑️ ku study card okukaggyawo. Kino kisazaamu okusoma n’eby’okuddamu byo byonna ebiterekeddwa ku lwakwo — enkalakkalira. Sooka okufulumya ebweru oba okugabana eby’okuddamu byo bw’oba oyagala okubikuuma.
onboarding_progressbar_slide1_body: Layini eya langi ennyimpi wansi w’ebbaala eya waggulu eraga ekitundu ki eky’ebibuuzo mu ssuula eriwo kati ky’ozzeemu. Kitereeza nga bw’otereka. Osobola okugikoleeza oba okugiggyako mu Settings → App → Appearance → Show progress bar.
onboarding_swipenav_slide1_body: Swipe ku kkono okugenda mu ssuula eddako, ku ddyo ku eyo eyasooka. Osobola n’okukozesa obutambi Next / Previous wansi wa buli ssuula (bino bisobola okulagibwa oba okukwekebwa mu Settings).
onboarding_swipenav_slide2_body: Singa okukuba owulira nga kyangu nnyo okutandika mu butanwa — oba nga kizibu nnyo okwewandiisa — genda ku Settings → App → Navigation → Swipe Sensitivity olonde Low, Medium, oba High.
onboarding_rememberpos_slide1_body: Ggyako "Jjukira ekifo kyange" mu Settings → App → Appearance okudda mu ssuula yo esembayo mu ngeri ey'otoma ng'ogguddewo app. Era eyongerako akabonero ka Continue → ku lupapula lw’omutwe osobole okulonda wennyini we wakoma. Yeetaaga Intermediate interface mode oba waggulu.
onboarding_leadersnotes_slide1_body: Ebiwandiiko by’abakulembeze biwa obulagirizi bw’obusumba eri abakulembeze b’ebibinja n’ababuulirizi — ensonga enkulu ez’okusomesa n’ebiwandiiko ku bikwata ku buli ssuula.
onboarding_leadersnotes_slide2_body: Genda ku Settings → App → Optional Pages → Leaders’ Notes ogikyuse. Yeetaaga mode y'enkolagana ey'omu makkati. Bw’omala okusobozesa, Ebiwandiiko by’Abakulembeze birabika mu menu ya Contents.
onboarding_answercheck_slide1_body: Akabonero akatono akalaga ceeke kalabika wansi ku ddyo ku kaadi z’ebibuuzo ezisaanidde. Kinyige okudduka okukebera okw’amangu nga tolina mutimbagano ku ky’okuddamu kyo — kitunuulira obuwanvu, obukwatagana, n’okumanya oba eky’okuddamu kyo kikwatagana n’ekitundu. Tekyetaagisa kuyungibwa ku yintaneeti. Tewali kintu kyonna kisindikibwa wonna.
onboarding_answercheck_slide2_body: Mu mbeera ya Manual, okukebera kutambula nga okwata ku kabonero ggwe kennyini — kale osigala ng’ofuga ddi lw’ofuna ebiddibwamu. Koona ku kabonero ako essaawa yonna ng’omaze okuwandiika eky’okuddamu kyo.
onboarding_answercheck_slide3_body: Mu mbeera ya Auto (esookerwako), okukebera kutambula mu ngeri ya otomatiki buli lwe wabaawo eky’okuddamu kyo lwe kiterekebwa — naye singa oba okyusizza eky’okuddamu kyo okuva ku kukebera okwasembayo, kale tekukuba masasi emirundi ebiri ku kiwandiiko kye kimu. Kyusa wakati wa Manual ne Auto mu Settings → App → Answer Check.
renderchapter_answer_tools_mic_desc: koona okulagira eky’okuddamu kyo ng’okozesa eddoboozi mu kifo ky’okuwandiika. Kirabika singa ekyuma kyo kiwagira okuyingiza okwogera.
renderchapter_answer_tools_localvalidate: ekola okukebera okw’amangu nga tolina mukutu gwa yintaneeti ku ky’okuddamu kyo era n’awa endowooza ennyimpimpi. Mu mbeera ya Manual okwata ku kabonero kano ggwe kennyini; mu Auto mode ekola otomatiki oluvannyuma lwa buli kutereka. Kino osobola okukikyusa mu Settings → App.
renderchapter_answer_tools_aichat_desc: omusomesa wa AI ow’okwesalirawo akuwa endowooza enzijuvu ku kuddamu kwo. Off nga bwekiba; gikole mu Nteekateeka → App.
renderchapter_eyebrow_info_body:
Nkwata ku kabonero ka ☆ ku kaadi y'ebibuuzo okugiteekako emmunyeenye. Ebibuuzo ebiriko emmunyeenye biwandiikiddwa mu zaabu era ne bikung’aanyizibwa mu kipande ekifunze waggulu ku ssuula, n’olwekyo osobola okuzuula amangu ebibuuzo by’osinga okwagala okuddamu oba okukubaganya ebirowoozo. Era zirabika mu Progress Overview yo.

Nkwata ku kabonero k’akazindaalo munda mu kifo kyonna eky’okuddamu okulagira eky’okuddamu kyo ng’okozesa eddoboozi mu kifo ky’okuwandiika. Akabonero kalabika singa ekyuma kyo kiwagira okuyingiza okwogera.

Layini ya langi ennyimpi wansi w’ebbaala ey’okungulu ye bbaala yo ey’enkulaakulana y’essuula — ejjula nga bw’oddamu ebibuuzo mu ssuula eno.

Eby’okuddamu byo biterekebwa mu ngeri ey’otoma ng’ovudde mu kifo ky’okuddamu — teweetaaga kukola kintu kyonna. Ekiwandiiko kya Save kiri awo bw’oba oyagala okutereka mu ngalo, okugeza nga tonnaba kugabana by’okuddamu byo.
renderlib_download_estudy: Wano wefunire estudy ku kyuma kyo
renderlib_load_estudy_device: Tikka estudy okuva ku kyuma kyo
renderlib_all_empty_body: Genda ku Load tab otikkire fayiro ya .estudy okutandika.
renderlib_recent_empty_body: Emisomo gy’oggulawo gijja kulabika wano okusobola okufuna amangu.
renderlib_shelves_empty_body: Teeka emisomo okulaba nga gitegekeddwa okusinziira ku biti.
renderlib_shelves_intro: Emisomo gyo egyateekebwamu gisunsulwa butereevu ku bushalofu okusinziira ku mulamwa — Endagaano Enkadde n’Empya, Enzikiriza, Obulamu, Obuweereza, n’ebirala. Kozesa obusawo okulambula by’olina n’obuuka butereevu mu kifo we basomera.
renderlib_shelves_popup_body:
Bw'oteeka ekifo eky'okuyiga Baibuli, kirangirira shelf ki gye kiri — okugeza "Endagaano Enkadde", "Enzikiriza", oba "Obulamu". Okulaba kwa Shelves kukozesa tags zino okusengeka buli kimu ky’otadde mu kifo kimu ekirongoofu.

Osobola okutambula ku shelf okulaba by’olina mu kitundu ekimu, oba okukikozesa okulaba ebituli byonna mu kusoma kwo — mpozzi olina emisomo mingi egy’Endagaano Empya naye nga gitono okuva mu Ndagaano Enkadde, oba emisomo mingi egy’Enzikiriza naye nga si nnyo ku bulamu bw’Ekikristaayo.

Tap any study title to open it.

Tap any study title to open it butereevu. Singa shelf eba eraga ebitundu (nga "Law" oba "Gospels & Acts"), kozesa Expand all okubikkula ennyiriri z'okusoma ssekinnoomu munda mu buli kitundu.

By default, shelves empty teziragibwa – ezo ezitaliiko misomo giteekeddwa mu butuufu – teziragibwa. Bw’oba oyagala okuziraba, osobola okuzikoleeza mu kitundu kya Settings/Library.
renderlib_paths_intro: Amakubo g’okuyiga bye bibinja by’okuyiga Baibuli ebikuyamba okuyunga okuyiga kwo awamu, era ebikusobozesa okulondoola obulungi enkulaakulana yo.
renderlib_paths_popup_body:
Amakubo g’okuyiga ge nkuŋŋaanya ezikuŋŋaanyiziddwa ez’okuyiga Baibuli ezitegekeddwa okukuwa obumanyirivu obw’okuyiga obwetooloovu era obutegekeddwa. Mu kifo ky’okusoma emitwe egy’omuntu kinnoomu mu kweyawula, ekkubo likulungamya mu lugendo olugatta — okukuyamba okuzimba ku by’oyize nga bw’ogenda.

Buli kkubo ligenderera okussaamu okunoonyereza okuggyiddwa mu bugazi bw’okuyiga kw’Ekikristaayo: Endagaano Enkadde, Endagaano Empya, enzikiriza z’Ekikristaayo ezikulu (theology), . obulamu (obulamu n’obuyigirizwa bw’Ekikristaayo), ne obuweereza (okuweereza n’okukulembera abalala). Kino kitegeeza nti ekkubo lyonna ly’onoogoberera, ojja kuba weenyigira mu Byawandiikibwa n’emitwe egy’enjawulo — si kitundu kimu kyokka.

Okusobola okwanguyirwa okutandika, tukuŋŋaanyizza emisomo gyonna mu buli kkubo wamu mu fayiro emu eya zipu. Koona ku kabonero k’okuwanula okumpi n’ekkubo okuwanula n’okuteeka buli kimu omulundi gumu.
renderlib_paths_hidden_note: {count} ekitundu ekisingawo{bala, obungi, ekimu{} ekirala{s}} mu kkubo lino tebiragiddwa wano. Okuziraba zonna, genda ku Settings → Library oyongeze ku nteekateeka ya Paths.
renderlib_study_not_available: Okunoonyereza kuno tekunnabaawo, naye tukola ku kufulumya mu biseera eby’omu maaso.
renderlib_pathway_not_available: Ekkubo lino terinnabaawo, naye tulikolako okusobola okufulumizibwa mu biseera eby'omu maaso.
renderlib_download_coming_soon: Download link ejja mu bbanga ttono
renderpages_newhere_hasstudy_body: Bw’oba oyagala okumanya amangu ebikwata ku kusoma nga tonnabbira mu mazzi, kwata ku bbaatuuni eri wansi. Kijja kukulaga slayidi ez'ennyanjula ez'okusoma {studyTitle} nate.
renderpages_newhere_nostudy_body: Tewali kusoma kutikkiddwa n’okutuusa kati. Yolekera Library okutikka okusoma — app ejja kukutambuza mu nnyanjula omulundi ogusooka ng’ogiggulawo.
renderpages_newhere_appslides_prompt: Bw’oba oyagala okuddamu okulaba slide z’ennyanjula ya app, kwata ku bbaatuuni eno:
renderpages_topbar_library_desc: Koona ku kabonero akali ku kkono ennyo okuggulawo Library yo — olukalala lwa fayiro z’okusoma z’otikka. Okuva awo osobola okukyusa emisomo oba okutikka empya.
renderpages_topbar_search_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’okunoonya okunoonya mu bibuuzo byonna n’eby’okuddamu byo ebiterekeddwa mu kunoonyereza okuliwo kati.
renderpages_topbar_progress_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’enkulaakulana okuggulawo Enkulaakulana Okutwalira awamu — mu bufunze ebibuuzo bimeka by’ozzeemu mu buli ssuula, n’empeta y’okumaliriza okusoma kwonna.
renderpages_topbar_howto_desc: Koona ku kabonero Engeri y’Okukozesaamu okuggulawo olupapula luno. Ennyonnyola engeri y’okuganyulwamu ennyo mu kusoma era n’etambula mu bikozesebwa mu app eno.
renderpages_topbar_settings_desc: Koona ku kabonero akalaga ensengeka okuggulawo Enteekateeka. Ebikulu by’oyinza okulonda: Obunene bw’Ekiwandiiko, Engeri Enzikiza, okuwulikika kw’okukuba, obuwanvu bw’akabokisi k’okuddamu, n’ensengeka y’okugabana.
renderpages_topbar_contents_desc: Koona ku bbaatuuni y’ebirimu okuggulawo olukalala lw’essuula mu bujjuvu. Koona ku ssuula yonna okubuuka butereevu ku yo. Essuula ezirina eby’okuddamu ebiterekeddwa ziteekebwako akabonero ka ✓.
renderpages_topbar_progressbar_desc: Layini eya langi ennyimpi wansi ennyo ku bbaala eya waggulu eraga ebibuuzo bimeka mu ssuula eriwo kati ebiddiddwamu. Osobola okugikoleeza oba okugiggyako mu Settings. (Tekirabikira ku mpapula 'ezitali za ssuula' nga omuko guno.)
renderpages_topbar_gotosettings_body: Osobola okutereeza endabika ya app n’enneeyisa yaayo — sayizi y’empandiika, mode enzikivu, okuwulikika, n’ebirala — okuva ku lupapula lw’Enteekateka.
renderpages_chapters_biblepopup_desc: W’olaba akabonero akatono aka info ku mabbali g’ekintu ekijuliziddwa, kanyige okusoma ekitundu mu pop-up. Ebitundu byonna biva mu Baibuli ya NET. (Other info pop-ups zijja kukuwa n'amawulire amalala.)
renderpages_chapters_starring_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’emmunyeenye ku kaadi yonna ey’ekibuuzo okugiteekako emmunyeenye. Ebibuuzo ebiriko emmunyeenye bifuna ekifaananyi kya zaabu era birabika mu kipande ekifunze waggulu ku ssuula ne mu Progress Overview.
renderpages_chapters_notes_desc: Ekitundu eky’okuwandiika eky’eddembe wansi wa buli ssuula ku kintu kyonna ekitakwatagana na bibuuzo ebitegekeddwa. Ebirimu mu Share and Export. Amagezi: nyweza ekifo kyonna eky’okuddamu okukoppa ebirimu ku kipande.
renderpages_chapters_save_desc: Koona ku Teeka okutereka eby'okuddamu byo. App era auto-saves nga osenguka okuva mu kifo ky'okuddamu.
renderpages_chapters_print_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’okukuba ebitabo okukuba oba okutereka essuula nga PDF ng’eby’okuddamu byo biri mu layini. Kozesa Enteekateeka okukuba essuula zonna omulundi gumu.
renderpages_chapters_share_desc: Koona ku Gabana wansi w’essuula yonna okuweereza eby’okuddamu byo ng’oyita ku WhatsApp, email, oba app endala yonna ku ssimu yo — ey’omugaso okugabana n’omukulembeze w’ekibiina oba omubuulirizi. Laba okumanya ebisingawo.
renderpages_chapters_voice_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’akazindaalo munda mu kifo kyonna eky’okuddamu okulagira eky’okuddamu kyo ng’okozesa eddoboozi — kya mugaso ku ssimu ng’okuwandiika kuyinza okuba mpola. Butaamu ejja kulabika ng’ekyuma kyo kiwagira okuyingiza okwogera.
renderpages_chapters_answercheck_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’okukebera ku kaadi z’ebibuuzo ezisaanidde okusobola okukebera amangu eky’okuddamu kyo nga tolina mukutu — kakebera obuwanvu, obukwatagana, n’okumanya oba eky’okuddamu kyo kikwatagana n’ekitundu. Tekyetaagisa yintaneeti. Mu mbeera ya Auto kino kikola otomatiki oluvannyuma lwa buli kutereka; mu Manual mode (esookerwako) ogikuba ggwe kennyini. Kyusa kino mu .
renderpages_chapters_readaloud_desc: Akabonero k’emizindaalo ku bitundu ebiwanvu kaleka app okubisoma mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka. Osobola okutereeza ebitundu ki gye kirabika mu <button class="howto-inline-link" onclick="Router.navigate({ page: 'settings' })">Ensengeka</button> (ng'okozesa enkola y'enkolagana ey'omulembe ey'Ensengeka).
renderpages_chapters_navbtns_desc: Butaamu Back ne Next wansi wa buli ssuula. Osobola n’okukuba ku kkono/ku ddyo okutambula wakati w’essuula.
renderpages_chapters_other_desc: Okunoonyereza okumu kulimu ebintu ebirala — gamba ng’ebibuuzo ebimpi oba Go Deeper ebifuluma nga biriko okusoma okw’enjawulo oba ebyafaayo. Bino bijja kukola amakulu ng’obisisinkanye.
renderpages_library_loading_body: Koona ku kabonero k’etterekero ly’ebitabo akali mu nsonda waggulu ku kkono okuggulawo Library yo. Bw’oba ofunye fayiro ya .estudy, koona ku Tikka Study wansi ku screen ya Library okugiyingiza. Olwo okusoma kujja kulabika mu lukalala lwo era osobola okuggulwawo essaawa yonna.
renderpages_library_switching_body: Emisomo gyonna gy’otikka girabika mu Layibulale. Koona ku emu yonna okugiggulawo. Eby’okuddamu byo mu buli kusoma bikuumibwa nga bya njawulo.
renderpages_library_removing_body: Okuggya okusoma mu Library, kwata ku kabonero ka 🗑️ ku kaadi yaayo. Kino kijja kusazaamu okusoma n’eby’okuddamu byo byonna ebiterekeddwa ku lwo. Kakasa nti osoose kugabana oba okukuba eby’okuddamu byo bw’oba oyagala okubikuuma.
renderpages_sharing_chapter_body: Wansi mu buli ssuula, kwata ku Gabana okuweereza eby’okuddamu byo ku ssuula eyo ng’oyita ku WhatsApp, email, oba app endala yonna ku ssimu yo. Eno y’engeri ennungi ey’okugabana emirimu gyo n’omukulembeze w’ekibiina oba omubuulirizi nga tonnaba kusisinkana.
renderpages_sharing_all_body: Okugabana eby’okuddamu byo okuva mu buli ssuula omulundi gumu, genda ku Ensengeka → Okusoma → Data → Gabana eby’okuddamu byonna. Kino kikung’aanya buli kimu mu kiwandiiko kimu.
renderpages_sharing_print_body: Koona ku kabonero ka 🖸 ku ssuula yonna okukuba oba okutereka PDF y’essuula eyo ng’eby’okuddamu byo bijjudde Okufulumya essuula zonna nga PDF emu, genda ku Ensengeka → Okusoma → Data → Kuba / okufulumya essuula zonna.
renderpages_sharing_format_body: Mu Settings osobola okulonda wakati wa WhatsApp Formatted (obubonero obulaga ebiwandiiko ebinene WhatsApp by’elaga nga enzirugavu) ne Plain Text (esinga ku email). Kino osobola okukyusa essaawa yonna.
renderpages_shareapp_know_body: Bw’oba olowooza nti omuntu omulala yandisanze okusoma kuno nga kwa mugaso — mukwano gwo, omuntu w’omu maka go, omuntu mu kkanisa yo — osobola okugabana enkolagana ku app ng’okozesa akabonero akali wansi.
renderpages_shareapp_download_intro: Osobola n’okuwanula app eno butereevu n’ogiteeka ku kyuma kya Android. Fayiro eno zipu ekuumibwa n’ekigambo ky’okuyingira — wuuno engeri y’okugifuula ekola:
renderpages_shareapp_download_step1: Koona ku bbaatuuni eno wammanga okuwanula fayiro ya zip okuva ku Google Drive.
renderpages_shareapp_download_note: (Ensonga lwaki password eri nti Google Drive essaako bendera ya fayiro za .apk; password + zip eyita ku kino.)
renderpages_copyright_licence_link: Okulaba kkopi ya layisinsi eno, genda ku creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0.
renderpages_copyright_share_entry: Gabana: koppa era oddemu okusaasaanya ebintu mu ngeri yonna oba mu nkola yonna.
renderpages_copyright_adapt_entry: Adapt: remix, transform, era okuzimba ku material olw'ekigendererwa kyonna, wadde mu by'obusuubuzi.
renderpages_copyright_attribution_entry: Okulaga: Olina okuwa ebbanja erisaanira, okuwa enkolagana eri layisinsi, n'okulaga oba enkyukakyuka zakolebwa.
renderpages_copyright_sharealike_entry: ShareAlike: Bw'oba okyusakyusa, okukyusa, oba okuzimba ku bintu, olina okugaba ebiweebwayo byo wansi wa layisinsi y'emu n'ey'olubereberye.
renderpages_settings_textsize_preview: Abatuukirivu bajja kubeera mu kukkiriza. Ekizaalibwa Omwoyo gwe mwoyo.
renderpages_settings_darkmode_desc: Kyangu ku maaso mu kitangaala ekitono
renderpages_settings_progressbar_desc: Ebbaala ya zaabu eraga okumaliriza essuula
renderpages_settings_rememberplace_desc: Bw’oddamu okutandika, ddayo ku ssuula gye wali osoma. Era laga akabonero ka Continue ku lupapula lw’omutwe.
renderpages_settings_readingfont_desc: Londa efonti ekozesebwa ku biwandiiko by’omubiri mu kusoma kwonna
renderpages_settings_iconstyle_desc: Londa sitayiro y’ebifaananyi ebikozesebwa mu app yonna. Kitandika okukola ng’oddako okutambulira.
renderpages_settings_answercheck_desc:
Ekitabo — akabonero k’okukebera eby’okuddamu kalabika ku kaadi z’ebibuuzo ezisaanidde; kikwata ku ggwe kennyini ng’oyagala okuddamu.

Auto — okuddamu kudduka butereevu oluvannyuma lwa buli ky’okuddamu okuterekebwa (bw’ogenda okuva mu nnimiro), naye singa eky’okuddamu kikyuse okuva lwe wasembayo okukebera.
renderpages_settings_navbtns_desc: Laga obutambi obulaga essuula wansi wa buli ssuula
renderpages_settings_swipe_desc: Ewala gy'olina okukuba swipe okukyusa essuula
renderpages_settings_answerbox_desc: Obuwanvu bw’ekifo eky’okuddamu bwe kitandikira nga tonnatandika kuwandiika
renderpages_settings_myprogress_desc: Olupapula olufunze olulaga ebibuuzo bimeka by’ozzeemu mu buli ssuula, nga kuliko empeta y’okumaliriza.
renderpages_settings_notes_desc: Omuko ogw’okuwandiika ogw’obwereere oluvannyuma lwa Ch. 9, okugeza ku birowoozo ebitakwatagana bulungi mu ssuula yonna entongole. Data eterekebwa singa omuko guzikizibwa; kiddamu okulabika nga kizzeemu okukola.
renderpages_settings_leaders_desc: Obulagirizi bw’obusumba eri abakulembeze b’ebibinja n’ababuulirizi, nga mulimu ensonga z’okusomesa n’ebiwandiiko ku bikwata ku nsonga ezikwata ku buli ssuula.
renderpages_settings_howto_desc: Enyanjula ku app — engeri y’okufunamu ebisingawo okuva mu kunoonyereza, engeri ebibuuzo gye bikolamu, n’obulagirizi ku bikozesebwa mu app.
renderpages_settings_about_desc: Ensibuko ku kunoonyereza — ebigendererwa byakwo, enkola yaayo, n’omuwandiisi.
renderpages_settings_autosave_desc: Laga okukakasa okumpimpi ng’eby’okuddamu biterekeddwa mu ngeri ey’obwengula
renderpages_settings_shareformat_desc: WhatsApp Formatted eyongeddeko obubonero obuddugavu ku WhatsApp. Plain Text esinga ku email.
renderpages_settings_readaloud_desc: Koona ku kabonero k’emizindaalo ku kitundu oba ku kitundu ekifuluma okusobola okukisoma mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka. Londa akabonero bwe kalabika.
renderpages_settings_answerbtn_desc: Laga akabonero k’okukebera omusomesa wa AI ku kaadi z’ebibuuzo
renderpages_settings_appupdates_body:
App eno tennaba kubeera ku Google Play (naye ejja mu bbanga ttono). Mu kiseera kino:

  • Google Drive: Ebipya bisobola okuwanulibwa butereevu okuva ku Google Drive.
  • Zipped: Olw’okuba Google Drive yeegendereza ku fayiro za APK, fayiro ezingibwa mu fayiro ya zip ekuumibwa n’ekigambo ky’okuyita.
  • Ekigambo ky’okuyita: Ekigambo ky’okuyita kiri 1234.

Okuzza obuggya:

  1. Nyiga ku bbaatuuni wansi okuwanula zipu.
  2. Gisumule ng’okozesa ekigambo ky’okuyingira: 1234
  3. Ggulawo APK okuteeka.

(Ensonga y’ekigambo ky’okuyingira eri nti Google Drive essaako bendera .apk files; password + zip eyita ku kino.)
renderpages_settings_interfacemode_choos: Londa ebintu bimeka ebirabika. Kino osobola okukyusa essaawa yonna.
renderpages_settings_mode_basic_desc: okusoma okuyonjo nga kuliko ensengeka z’okwolesebwa ezikulu zokka.
renderpages_settings_mode_intermediate_d: eyongerako efonti y'okusoma, obunene bw'akabokisi k'okuddamu, empapula ez'okwesalirawo, Library, n'okulongoosa app.
renderpages_settings_wantmore_body: App erina Interface Mode efugira options mmeka z'olagibwa. Bw’omala okumanyiira engeri app gy’ekola, gezaako okukyusa okuva ku Basic okudda ku Intermediate, oba wadde Advanced. Ekikyusa Interface Mode kiri wansi ku lupapula luno.
renderpages_settings_shareall_desc: Kuŋŋaanya eby’okuddamu byo byonna ebiterekeddwa mu ssuula zonna omwenda mu kiwandiiko kimu okugabana ku WhatsApp, email, oba app endala yonna.
renderpages_settings_printall_desc: Kuŋŋaanya eby’okuddamu byo (nga waggulu) naye nga bisengekeddwa okukuba oba okubitereka nga fayiro ya PDF.
renderpages_settings_resetsettings_desc: Ezzaawo byonna by'oyagala (obunene bw'empandiika, mode enzirugavu, n'ensengeka endala) okudda ku bisookerwako. Enyanjula ya onboarding nayo egenda kuddamu okuzannya. Eby’okuddamu byo, ebiwandiiko byo, enkulaakulana yo, n’embeera gy’osoma mu kiseera kino tebikwatibwako.
renderpages_settings_clearwarning_text: Okugogola eby’okuddamu byo ya lubeerera era tekiyinza kuddibwamu. Eby’okuddamu byonna ebiwandiikiddwa mu ssuula zonna omwenda bijja kusazibwamu okuva ku kyuma kino. Tewali ngeri yonna gye tuyinza kuzizzaawo.
renderpages_settings_clearwarning_sugges: Oyinza okwagala okukozesa obutambi Gabana oba Print waggulu okutereka kkopi y'eby'okuddamu byo nga tonnabirongoosa.
renderpages_settings_recent_desc:
Laga emisomo gy’ogguddewo gye buvuddeko.
  • Off — tekiragiddwako.
  • >5 — kirabika ng’omaze okuba n’okunoonyereza okusukka mu 5.
  • On — bulijjo kiragibwa.
renderpages_settings_shelves_desc:
Laga emisomo egyategekebwa okusinziira ku biti.
  • Off — tekiragiddwako.
  • >8 — kirabika ng’omaze okuba n’okunoonyereza okusukka mu 8.
  • On — bulijjo eragiddwa.
renderpages_settings_emptyshelves_label: Oba okulaga obusawo obutaliimu kintu kyonna
renderpages_settings_emptyshelves_desc:
Fuga oba ebika ekyerere biragiddwa mu kitundu kya Shelves.
  • Tewali — ebitundu ekyerere n’obusawo bikwekebwa ddala.
  • Btono — ebitundu obwereere munda mu bushalofu obujjudde abantu biragiddwa mu sitayiro esirifu.
  • Bingi — obusawo obutaliimu n’ebitundu obwereere byonna biragiddwa.
  • Byonna — obusawo obutaliimu, ebitundu ekyerere, n’ebitundu ebitono ekyerere byonna biragiddwa.
renderpages_settings_paths_desc:
Laga amakubo g’okuyiga agategekeddwa okusinziira ku biti.
  • Off — tekiragibwako.
  • >2 — erabika ng’omaze okuba n’okunoonyereza okusukka mu 2.
  • On — bulijjo eragiddwa.
renderpages_settings_pathsamount_desc:
“Amakubo” (ensengekera z’okunoonyereza ezikuumibwa) mmeka ezirina okulagibwa.
  • Ekimu — laga ekkubo erisooka.
  • Mitono — emitwe egy’omutendera ogw’oku ntikko nga kwogasse n’omutwe omutono ogusooka mu buli emu.
  • Mingi — emitwe egy’omutendera ogw’oku ntikko nga kwogasse n’emitwe emitono ebiri egisooka.
  • Byonna — emitendera gyonna egyalagibwa.
renderpages_settings_language_desc: Londa olulimi lw'ogenda okukozesa mu nkola ya app. Ebirimu mu kusoma kwo n’eby’okuddamu tebikwatibwako.
progress_encourage_0: Mwetegefu okutandika – ka tugende mu maaso.
progress_encourage_24: Otandise bulungi. Sigala ng'ogenda mu maaso!
progress_encourage_49: Okusemberera ekitundu ky’ekkubo – oyinza okutuukayo mu bwangu otya?
progress_encourage_74: Okusukka mu kitundu ky’ekkubo. Tolekera awo.
progress_no_study_active: Tewali kunoonyereza kugenda mu maaso n’okutuusa kati
progress_count_no_answers_start: Tewali by’okuddamu biterekeddwa n’okutuusa kati – tandika n’Essuula 1
progress_count_pathway_all_done: Ebibuuzo byonna eby’ekkubo byaddibwamu – okoze bulungi!
progress_detail_open_to_start: Ggulawo okunoonyereza kuno okutandika okulondoola enkulaakulana.
progress_notes_placeholder: Wandiika ekintu kyonna wano — tewali bibuuzo by’olina kuddamu era tewali kuddamu kutuufu oba kukyamu...
progress_notes_info_body:
Kino kifo kya kwesalirawo eri ebiwandiiko byonna oba ebirowoozo ebitakwatagana bulungi mu ssuula entongole — okwetegereza okukwata essuula eziwerako, ebibuuzo by’oyagala okuddamu, ebintu bye wawulira mu kukubaganya ebirowoozo mu kibiina, oba ekintu ekirala kyonna ky’oyagala okujjukira.

Kikozese mu ngeri yonna gy’olaba nga kiyamba, oba kibuusa amaaso ddala bw’oba oyagala. Tekijja kukosa nkulaakulana yo ng’oyita mu kusoma. Osobola okuddamu okuggyako omuko guno ekiseera kyonna mu Ensengeka.

Bw’ogiggyako, ekintu kyonna ky’owandiise wano kikuumibwa bulungi era kijja kuddamu okulabika singa okiddamu okukikoleeza.
search_empty_prompt:
Tandika okuwandiika okunoonya ebibuuzo,
ebitundu, n'eby'okuddamu byo ebiterekeddwa.
settings_clear_answers_body: Kino kijja kusazaamu enkalakkalira eby’okuddamu byo byonna ebiterekeddwa olw’okunoonyereza kuno. Kino tekiyinza kuggyibwawo.
settings_reset_body:
Kino kijja kuzzaawo ensengeka zo zonna (obunene bw'empandiika, embeera enzirugavu, n'ebirala by'oyagala) okudda ku bisookerwako. Enyanjula ya onboarding nayo ejja kuddamu okuzannya ku kutongoza okuddako.

Eby’okuddamu byo, ebiwandiiko, enkulaakulana, n’ekifo ky’okusoma ekiriwo kati tebijja kukosebwa.
shareprint_no_answers_body: Tonnatereka kuddamu kwonna. Sooka okole mu ssuula ezimu, olwo oddeyo okutunda ebweru w’eggwanga.
shareprint_print_fallback_chapter: {studyTitle} — Essuula {ennamba}: {chapterTitle} (Okukuba ebitabo tekuliiwo — kozesa Gabana mu kifo ky'ekyo)
shareprint_print_fallback_all: Print tesangibwa ku kyuma kino. Kozesa Gabana eby'okuddamu byonna mu kifo ky'ekyo.
studyloader_delete_body: Kino kiggyawo enkalakkalira okusoma n’eby’okuddamu byo byonna ebiterekeddwa. Ogabana oba okubye omulimu gwo?
studyloader_version_older: Fayiro eno ey’okunoonyereza nkadde okusinga bwe kyali kisuubirwa. Fayiro: v{ekituufu} · App esuubira: v{kisuubirwa}. Nsaba ozzeeyo fayiro y'okusoma okutuuka ku nkyusa eyasembyeyo.
studyloader_version_newer: Fayiro eno ey’okunoonyereza mpya okusinga bwe kyali kisuubirwa. Fayiro: v{ekituufu} · App esuubira: v{kisuubirwa}. Nsaba okulongoosa app eno okutuuka ku nkyusa eyasembyeyo.
studyloader_picker_body: Londa fayiro ya data y’okusoma (.estudy) okutikka essuula zaayo, ebibuuzo, n’ebirimu.
studyloader_error_no_study_json: {erinnya lya fayiro} ye zipu naye terimu fayiro ekoma mu study.json.
utils_celebration_sub: Essuula {ennamba} ewedde. Mugende mu maaso n'omulimu omulungi!
validation_tutor_input_placeholder: Buuza omugoberezi oba weereza eky'okuddamu kyo...
validation_tutor_err_network: Teyasobodde kutuuka ku musomesa wa AI — kebera omukago gwo era ogezeeko nate.
validation_tutor_err_429: AI tutor is busy — nsaba olindeko katono oddemu ogezeeko.
validation_tutor_err_auth: Omusomesa wa AI: Ekizibu ky'ekisumuluzo kya API. Kebera ensengeka z’okusoma.
validation_tutor_err_404: Omusomesa wa AI: model tezuuliddwa. Tuukirira omubuulizi w’okunoonyereza.
validation_tutor_err_500: Omusomesa wa AI: ensobi ya seva — gezaako nate mu kaseera katono.
validation_tutor_err_status: Omusomesa wa AI: ensobi {embeera} — nsaba ogezeeko nate.
validation_tutor_err_unknown: AI tutor: waliwo ekikyamu — nsaba oddemu ogezeeko.
validation_lv_stuck_hint: Kirabika oyinza okuba ng’osibye. Wano waliwo akabonero akalaga nti:
validation_lv_stuck_no_hint: Kirabika oyinza okuba ng’osibye. Gezaako okutandika n’ekyo ekitundu ekyo kye kikuleetera okulowooza, okuwulira, oba okwebuuza — ne bw’oba tokakasa kuddamu mu bujjuvu.
validation_lv_too_short: Eyo ntandikwa — naye osobola okwogera ebisingawo katono? Ne bwe kiba sentensi emu oba bbiri zokka kijja kukuyamba okwenyigira ennyo mu kibuuzo ekyo.
validation_lv_repeats_question: Kirabika eky’okuddamu kyo kiyinza okuba nga kiddiŋŋana ekibuuzo ekyo. Gezaako okuteeka ekirowoozo mu bigambo byo.
validation_lv_repeats_passage: Kirabika eky’okuddamu kyo kiyinza okuba nga kiddiŋŋana ekitundu ekyo. Gezaako okuddamu ekibuuzo okuva mu ekitundu, mu bigambo byo.
validation_lv_off_topic_hint: Eky’okuddamu kyo kiyinza okuba nga kigenda mu kkubo ery’enjawulo ku ekyo ekibuuzo kye kibuuza (oba olyawo olina engeri ey’enjawulo era ennyuvu yokka ey’okwolesaamu).
validation_lv_off_topic_no_hint: Eky’okuddamu kyo kiyinza okuba nga kigenda mu kkubo ery’enjawulo ku ekyo ekibuuzo kye kibuuza (oba olyawo olina engeri ey’enjawulo era ennyuvu yokka ey’okwolesaamu). Ddamu osome ekibuuzo n’obwegendereza era okebere emirundi ebiri: Endowooza ki entongole gye kikulaga?
validation_lv_pass_thematic: Kirabika bulungi. Eky’okuddamu kyo kikwatagana n’ekibuuzo — sigala ng’ogenda mu maaso.
validation_lv_pass_no_sample_no_hint: Eky’okuddamu kyo kiyita mu basic checks. Ekibuuzo kino tekirina data ya mulamwa eriwo, kale tewali kukebera kwa mulembe kwakolebwa.
